input:
Unaware that al-Ḥajjāj had become a Muslim, they said when they saw him coming towards them: “This is al-Ḥajjāj ibn ʿAllāṭ, and he must have the information we are looking for.” They rushed towards him and said: “Ḥajjāj, we have heard that the man [meaning the Prophet] has marched towards Khaybar, the Jewish city which is the garden of Hijaz.” Al-Ḥajjāj replied: “Yes, I heard of that, and I have very happy news for you.” Al-Ḥajjāj reports: They quickly gathered round my she-camel and asked me to speak.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 29: Back on the Move

output.scene_title: Al-Hajjaj Brings News of the Prophet's Journey
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Chapter 29: Back on the Move

characters.name: Al-Hajjaj ibn ʿAllāṭ
characters.appearance: Early 30s, light brown skin, athletic build, sharp features. Black beard, neatly trimmed. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, simple leather turban. Sandaled feet. Bright inquisitive eyes, slight smile.

characters.name: Unidentified Makkans
characters.appearance: Diverse group of Makkans in various age groups and clothing styles, all with faces obscured by shadows or from behind.

characters.name: Al-Hajjaj's She-Camel
characters.appearance: Large, majestic desert camel with light beige coat, black legs and humps, and a small black patch over one eye. Simple leather harness on back.

output.moral_lesson: Being a good friend and neighbor means being kind and willing to share good news with others.
output.narrative_text: When Al-Hajjaj came towards them, they thought he was the same man they were looking for. They rushed towards him and said, “We've heard the Prophet has marched towards Khaybar.” Al-Hajjaj replied, “Yes, I have happy news for you.”

compliance.notes: No Prophet shown in scene. Al-Hajjaj and unidentified Makkans shown in modest clothing. Al-Hajjaj's she-camel shown in silhouette.

output.image_prompt: Watercolor illustration of a 7th century Makkah street scene. Al-Hajjaj, a young Arab man in off-white thobe and brown cloak, with black beard and simple leather turban, walking towards a group of Makkans in the background, seen as silhouettes. Al-Hajjaj's she-camel, with light beige coat and black legs, in the foreground, with a small black patch over one eye. Simple mud-brick buildings and palm trees in the background, warm desert sun shining down. Medium shot, eye level. Warm earthy palette. No modern objects.
